# PERF-121 positive: two same-shape struct literals; the second
# could be a direct type conversion of the first
lang: go
file: PERF-121-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type Config struct {
	Host string
	Port int
}

type Options struct {
	Host string
	Port int
}

func toOptions(c Config) Options {
	src := Config{
		Host: c.Host,
		Port: c.Port,
	}
	return Options{
		Host: src.Host,
		Port: src.Port,
	}
}
